detail.title: Panjab University Result 2025 OUT Download Mark Sheet
detail.short_info: Panjab University Result 2025: Panjab University Result 2025 has been released on puchd.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your B.A 2nd Semester Results Online.

sections.heading: Panjab University Result 2025 OUT Download Mark Sheet

content.text: Are you waiting for Panjab University Result 2025? Great news! Panjab University has officially published the results for Bachelor of Arts (FYUP) 2nd Semester and B.Sc. (Honours) in Fashion and Lifestyle Technology (FYUP) 4th Semester examinations held in May 2025.

This article provides complete information about Panjab University Result 2025 including direct download links, merit lists, cutoff marks, mark sheet details, and step-by-step instructions to check results.

rows: BA (FYUP) 2nd Semester; B.Sc. (Hons.) Fashion & Lifestyle Technology (FYUP) 4th Semester

content.text: Check Your Result Now Download Panjab University Result 2025 Direct official link - Enter Roll No. for mark sheet

sections.heading: How to Check Panjab University Result 2025?

content.text: Students can download their Panjab University Result 2025 mark sheet by following this simple process:

items: Visit the official results portal: puchd.ac.in
Select your course: "Bachelor of Arts (FYUP) 2nd Sem" or "B.Sc. (Hons.) Fashion & Lifestyle Tech (FYUP) 4th Sem".
Enter your Roll Number and Captcha Code.
Click "Submit" to view your mark sheet/grade card.
Download the PDF and take a printout for records.

content.text: Note: Provisional results; original mark sheets from college. Merit lists available in PDF.

sections.heading: Panjab University Merit List 2025 - What's Inside?

content.text: The Panjab University merit list 2025 PDFs contain top performers category-wise for BA and B.Sc. programs.
